Quality Education.reason: As an 'Advanced Spanish Composition' university course, it directly provides quality tertiary education (Target 4.3) and develops advanced literacy and communication skills essential for learning outcomes and employment (Targets 4.4, 4.6).

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The course teaches skills in argumentation, expressing opinions, discussion, and communication, which are foundational for participatory decision-making (Target 16.7) and protecting fundamental freedoms (Target 16.10).
